title: Adventurer's Delight
description: A Farmer's Delight Addon Mod that adds food, flowers and decorations which you have to explore to find
body:
An add-on for the mod "Farmer's Delight", focused on gathering new materials and foodstuffs mainly through exploring and travelling the world. Current additions:

## Crops
**Warped Wart:** Grows on soul soil

**Oranges:** Drops occasionally from spruce leaves

**Pears:** Drops occasionally from birch leaves

## Food
**Chorus Pies:** An End Dimension version of your beloved pumpkin pie

**Stews:** Adds both nether wart and warped wart stew

**Skewers:** Adds a classic kebab

## Mobs
**Shrimp:** They like to dance sometimes ;D
